mapper.sql: LEFT JOIN ( SELECT s1.trip_id, s1.status AS settlement_status FROM settlements s1 INNER JOIN ( SELECT trip_id, MAX(created_at) AS max_created FROM settlements GROUP BY trip_id ) s2 ON s1.trip_id = s2.trip_id AND s1.created_at = s2.max_created ) latest ON latest.trip_id = t.id
mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status != 'withdrawn'

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trips t
WHERE latest.settlement_status IS NULL
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM settlements WHERE YEAR(created_at) = YEAR(CURDATE()) AND MONTH(created_at) = MONTH(CURDATE())
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE DATE(created_at) = CURDATE()

WITH RECURSIVE date_seq AS ( SELECT DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL (#{days} - 1) DAY) AS d UNION ALL SELECT DATE_ADD(d, INTERVAL 1 DAY) FROM date_seq WHERE d < CURDATE() ) SELECT DATE_FORMAT(ds.d, '%Y-%m-%d') AS date, COUNT(u.id) AS count FROM date_seq ds LEFT JOIN users u ON DATE(u.created_at) = ds.d AND u.status != 'withdrawn' GROUP BY ds.d ORDER BY ds.d

SELECT SUM(CASE WHEN latest.settlement_status IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS live, SUM(CASE WHEN latest.settlement_status = 'in_progress' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS settle, SUM(CASE WHEN latest.settlement_status = 'completed' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS done FROM trips t

SELECT u.id AS id, u.name AS name, u.login_provider AS provider, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip_members tm WHERE tm.user_id = u.id) AS tripCount, DATE_FORMAT(u.created_at, '%Y.%m.%d') AS joinedAt FROM users u WHERE u.status != 'withdrawn' ORDER BY u.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}

SELECT t.id AS id, t.name AS name, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trip_members tm WHERE tm.trip_id = t.id) AS memberCount, COALESCE((SELECT SUM(e.amount) FROM expenses e WHERE e.trip_id = t.id), 0) AS totalAmount, CASE WHEN latest.settlement_status IS NULL THEN 'live' WHEN latest.settlement_status = 'in_progress' THEN 'settle' ELSE 'done' END AS status FROM trips t
ORDER BY t.created_at DESC LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE status != 'withdrawn' AND created_at < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trips WHERE created_at >= DATE_SUB(DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(),'%Y-%m-01'), INTERVAL 1 MONTH) AND created_at < DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM trips WHERE created_at >= DATE_FORMAT(CURDATE(), '%Y-%m-01')
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM settlements WHERE YEAR(created_at) = YEAR(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH)) AND MONTH(created_at) = MONTH(DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 MONTH))
SELECT COUNT(*) FROM users WHERE DATE(created_at) = DATE_SUB(CURDATE(), INTERVAL 1 DAY)
